PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx next lint --fix --file "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PreToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '^\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files — use environment variables dashboard instead' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force).*\s+(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push to main/master is not allowed' >&2; exit 2; fi
